# Database connection example

```{python}
def load_project(
        name: str = "xl_database",
        mode: str = "Debug",
        dotnet: str = "net10.0"
    ) -> None:
    """ Helper for getting project paths from notebook. """
    import sys
    from pathlib import Path
    from IPython import get_ipython

    try:
        here = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
    except NameError:
        here = Path(get_ipython().run_line_magic("pwd", ""))

    assembly_path = here.parent / f"{name}/bin/{mode}/{dotnet}"
    sys.path.insert(0, str(assembly_path))

    from pythonnet import load
    load("coreclr", runtime_config="runtime.json")

    import clr
    clr.AddReference(name)
```

```{python}
load_project()
```

```{python}
from xl_database import XlDatabase
from xl_database import Equipment
from xl_database import AnalysisType
from xl_database import AnalysisResult
```

```{python}
db = XlDatabase()
```


```{python}
sem = Equipment(
    name         = "SEM",
    model        = "Model XYZ",
    manufacturer = "SEM Corp",
    serialNumber = "12345"
)

sem
```
